title: Logical Reasoning Path
description: Build fluency in Logical Reasoning inside Statistical Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Hypothesis Testing
steps.summary: Hypothesis Testing belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Logical Reasoning. Start after A/B Testing for Models. It opens into Bootstrap Hypothesis Testing.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Null Hypothesis
steps.summary: Null Hypothesis belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Logical Reasoning. Compare it with Hypothesis Testing and Alternative Hypothesis.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Alternative Hypothesis
steps.summary: Alternative Hypothesis belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Logical Reasoning. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Logical Reasoning. Compare it with Null Hypothesis and Hypothesis Testing.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
